skills.name: HTML
skills.description: HTML is the standard markup language used to structure content on the web, such as text, images, links, and forms.

skills.name: SCSS
skills.description: SCSS is a CSS preprocessor that adds features like variables, nesting, mixins, and functions to write cleaner and more maintainable styles.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.description: JavaScript is a programming language used to create interactive and dynamic behavior on websites, such as animations and form validation.

skills.name: PHP
skills.description: PHP is a server-side scripting language mainly used for building dynamic websites and handling data from databases.

skills.name: Node.js
skills.description: Node.js is a runtime environment that allows JavaScript to be executed on the server side for building scalable applications.

skills.name: Express.js
skills.description: Express.js is a minimal and flexible Node.js framework used to build web applications and APIs efficiently.

skills.name: Bootstrap
skills.description: Bootstrap is a front-end framework that helps create responsive and modern websites using prebuilt components and styles.

skills.name: phpMyAdmin
skills.description: phpMyAdmin is a web-based tool used to manage MySQL databases, including creating, editing, and deleting data.

skills.name: GitHub
skills.description: GitHub is a platform for version control and collaboration, allowing developers to manage code and work together on projects.

skills.name: Figma / Canva
skills.description: Figma and Canva are design tools used for creating UI designs, prototypes, and visual content for web and media projects.

skills.name: React
skills.description: React is een JavaScript library voor het bouwen van snelle en interactieve gebruikersinterfaces, vooral voor single-page applications, door gebruik te maken van herbruikbare componenten.
